1 C 1 1111111111 a mismatch

Starting at AND 57 increasing
AND 60 1000010000 partial 0111101111 8

left 14
Starting at I 0 decreasing
I 7 1101001001 partial 0010110110 5

Selected
0 AND 57
1 C 1n
2 C 2n
3 I 0
4 I 1
5 I 2
6 I 3
7 I 4

Applying to 11001000
Input
I 0 = 1
I 1 = 1
I 2 = 0
I 3 = 0
I 4 = 1
I 5 = 0
I 6 = 0
I 7 = 0
Output
0 AND 57 = AND(I 5,I 7) = AND(0,0) = 0
1 C 1n = NOT(1) = 0
2 C 2n = NOT(1) = 0
3 I 0 = 1
4 I 1 = 1
5 I 2 = 0
6 I 3 = 0
7 I 4 = 1

\boxed{00011001}
